description: Detail rows for changed membership categories. Intended as drill-through target from the summary card.
name: Members Who Changed Package - Current Year (Detail)

stages.native:
WITH settings AS (
  SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END) AS n8n_base_url
  FROM public.global_settings
  WHERE key = 'n8n_base_url'
), season_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (member_identity_key)
    member_identity_key,
    src.raw_member_id,
    (SELECT n8n_base_url FROM settings) AS n8n_base_url,
    trim(concat_ws(' ', src."First name", src."Last name")) AS "Name",
    src."Membership" AS "Current Membership",
    src.current_category,
    src."Email address",
    src.current_membership_group
  FROM (
    SELECT
      m.id AS raw_member_id,
      CASE
        WHEN NULLIF(lower(trim(COALESCE(m."Email address", ''))), '') IS NOT NULL THEN
          lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))) || '|' || lower(trim(m."Email address"))
        ELSE lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      END AS member_identity_key,
      m.*, p.category AS current_category, p.display_order,
      COALESCE(g.signup_match_group, lower(trim(p.category))) AS current_membership_group
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = ({{year}})::text
    LEFT JOIN public.membership_signup_match_groups g
      ON g.season = ({{year}})::text
     AND g.package_name = p.name
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  ) src
  ORDER BY member_identity_key, src.raw_member_id DESC, src.display_order, src."Membership"
), prev_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (member_identity_key)
    member_identity_key,
    src."Membership" AS "Previous Membership",
    src.previous_category,
    src.previous_membership_group
  FROM (
    SELECT
      CASE
        WHEN NULLIF(lower(trim(COALESCE(m."Email address", ''))), '') IS NOT NULL THEN
          lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))) || '|' || lower(trim(m."Email address"))
        ELSE lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      END AS member_identity_key,
      m.id AS raw_member_id,
      m.*, p.category AS previous_category, p.display_order,
      COALESCE(g.signup_match_group, lower(trim(p.category))) AS previous_membership_group
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
    LEFT JOIN public.membership_signup_match_groups g
      ON g.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
     AND g.package_name = p.name
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  ) src
  ORDER BY member_identity_key, src.raw_member_id DESC, src.display_order, src."Membership"
)
SELECT
  c.raw_member_id,
  c.n8n_base_url,
  ({{year}})::text AS filter_year,
  c."Name",
  p.previous_category AS "Previous Category",
  p."Previous Membership",
  c.current_category AS "Current Category",
  c."Current Membership",
  c."Email address"
FROM season_members c
JOIN prev_members p
  ON p.member_identity_key = c.member_identity_key
WHERE c.current_membership_group IS DISTINCT FROM p.previous_membership_group
[[AND p.previous_category = {{previous_category}}]]
[[AND c.current_category = {{current_category}}]]
ORDER BY c."Name";
